titleStmt.title: SII 17.610: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 610. (A.R. No. 565 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription stops after a few lines of the praśasti Pūmālai miḍaindu etc., of Vikramachōḷa (1118-1135 A.D.).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmālai miṭaintu poṉmālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai malinta parumaṇittiraḷpuyat tirunilama
ṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppak kaṉavarai mārvan taṉateṉap peṟṟut tirumakaḷorutaṉiyi
ruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppa
toṟu tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akila puvaṉamuṅ kavippator putuma
veṇkuṭai mimīcai niṟpak karuṅkali yoḷittu vaṉpilattiṭaik kiṭappak kuḷattiṭai
tteiuṅka vīmaṉ vilaṅkal micai yeṟavuṅ kaliṅka pūmiyaik kaṉaleri parukavum Aimpaṭaip
paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalat tāṅkiṉitiruntu vaṭaticai AṭippaṭuttaruThe inscription ends here. The engraving has been done very indifferently.
Digital edition of SII 17.610 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
